name: Mount Doom
text: Begin with the standard quest deck and encounter deck for the Mount Doom scenario. Remove the following cards, in the specified quantities, from the standard encounter deck: 1x Something 2x Something Else Then, shuffle the encounter cards in this Nightmare Deck into the remainder of the standard Mount Doom encounter deck. Finally, flip this setup card over and place it next to the quest deck. Its effect remains active throughout the game, which is now ready to begin.

name: Isenmouthe Lookout
text: Cannot be optionally engaged. Forced: After a player fails a fortitude test, raise their threat by 1.
shadow: Shadow: Attacking enemy gets +1 [attack]. (+2 [attack] instead if you failed a fortitude test this round.)

name: Soldier from Durthang
text: Forced: At the end of the round, raise the engaged player’s threat by 4.
shadow: Shadow: Raise your threat by 1 for each enemy engaged with you.

name: Barad-dûr Heavy
text: Forced: When Barad-dûr Heavy attacks, exhaust a hero you control.
shadow: Shadow: Exhaust a hero you control.

name: Glens of the Morgai
text: While Glens of the Morgai is in the staging area, other locations get +1 quest point. Travel: The first player makes a fortitude test. If they fail this test, exhaust each hero they control.

name: Gaping Fissure
text: While Gaping Fissure is in the staging area, players must commit at least 2 characters to fortitude tests if they commit any characters at all. Travel: Discard 1 resource or attachment from each hero.
shadow: Shadow: Discard a non-objective attachment you control.

name: Watch-fire
text: While Watch-fire is in the staging area, enemies get –11 engagement cost. Travel: Raise each player’s threat by 4.

name: Dark Creeping Shapes
text: When Revealed: If there are no enemies in the discard pile, discard cards from the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Make a fortitude test. If you fail this test, reveal the enemy in the discard pile with the highest engagement cost. If you succeed, shuffle it into the encounter deck instead.

name: Clouds of Hungry Midges
text: When Revealed: Make a fortitude test. If you fail this test, deal X damage among characters you control, where X is the tens digit of your threat.
shadow: Shadow: Deal 1 damage to the defending character.

name: Last Drop of Water
text: When Revealed: Each player makes a fortitude test. Deal 1 damage to each hero committed to this test. Each player who fails this test discards 1 character they control.
shadow: Shadow: Exhaust a character you control.
